raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 63,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas notiks / ittin ka
i, tas KUNGS pahr jums preeza-
jahs / jums lab darriht / un juhs
wairoht/ta preezafees tas KUNgs
pahr jums/ juhs nomaitaht / un
juhs isdeloht / un juhs tapfeet
ispohtiti no taha Semmes Wir-
fus / us kurren juhs eijat winnu
eemantoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 64,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS iskai-
fths tew starp wiſfahm Tau-
tahm/ no weena Semmes Galla
lihds ohtram Semmes Gallam/
un tur kalpoſi tu zitteem Dee-
weem / ko tu ne eſti pasinnis/
neds tawi Tehwi/ Kohſam un Ak-
mixam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 65,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu ne buhſi ar Meeru
starp tahm Tantahm/ un tawat
Pehdai ne buhſ Duffefhana/
jo tas KUNGS dohs tew tur
weenu drebbejanu Sirđi/ un no-
nihkuſchas Azzis / un weenu no-
skummufchu Dwehfeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 66,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tawa Dsihwiba karra-
fees tawa Preekſcha (ittin ka pee
Pawehdeena)/ un tu bailofees
Nakti un Deena / un ne ustizze-
fees dsihwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 67,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rihtos fazziji tu : kaut
jaw Wakkars buhtu / un Wakka-
rös fazziji tu : Kaut jaw Rihts
buhtu/no tawas Sirđs Isvailes/
par ko tu bailofees / un no ta/ kas
tawahm Azzim rahdifees / ko tu
redseti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 68,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS weddihs
pakkat ar Laiwahm us E-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "giptes-Semmi / pa to Zettu / ni
ka es tew fazztjs efmu: tu ne redse
fi winnu wairs/ un tur tu gribbe
fees taweem Eenaidneefeem par
Kalpeem un par Kalponehun pahr
dohtees/ bet tur ne fahda Pirzeje
ne buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXIX. Nodalla.
Mohsus fkubbina Ifraelu Deewa Bauſlibn tur
reht: i/ 9. Peekohdina teem un winn
Behneem to Deewa Derribu: 10. Ka teen
ne buhs no Deewa atkahpt: 18. Zittadi t
Deewa Duſmiba pahr to Semminahfs: 28
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Chee irr tahs Derriba
Wahrdi/ ko tas KUNG
Mohsum irr pawehlejs
ar Ifraela Behrneem darriht Mo
aba Semme / pahri pahr to Der
ribu/ ko winſch Oreba ar teem bi
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus atzinaja wiſf
Ifraelu/ un fazzija us teem: juh
effat wiſfu redsejzchi / ko ta
KUNGS Egiptes-Semne juh
fu Preekſcha darrijs pee Warauſs
un pee wiſfeem winna Kalpeem
un pee wiſnas winna Semnes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſfas tahs leelas Rahrdi
naschanas/ ko tawas Azzis irr re
dseischas/tahs paſchas leelas Si-
mes un Brihnunus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS jums n
irr weenit Sirđi dewis / kas fo
prastu / nedg Azzis / kas redsetu
nedg Autis / kas dsrdetu lith-
schat paschai Deenai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es efimu juhs tschetrde
mits Gaddus lizzis Tuksneti sta-
gaht / juhsas Drebbes ne irr ne-
dilluschas no juhfo Wirfus / u
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
